subject: Disable Resource Capacity audition by default
commit_message:
Disable Resource Capacity audition by default

Allow user to enable it by setting capacity_auditor_enabled:true
Fix esr-system-info-id updating issue

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-1038
Change-Id: I734f7ce614787a04e37b8707ed9be3675c5db629
Signed-off-by: Bin Yang <bin.yang@windriver.com>
